_meta.name: CLM r4 NVL relaunch — health check followup

pod.name: anima-clm1b-r4-nvl
pod.note_ephemeral_risk: volumeInGb=0 remains — relying on R2 periodic sync via r2_sync_watcher for durability

tmux_session_note: clm_r4_nvl runs 'tail -F /workspace/ckpt_clm1b_r4/train.log' for live viewing; training itself runs under nohup (PID 1161) from /workspace/launch_clm_r4.sh. r2_sync tmux session runs the R2 sync watcher (60s interval).
binary_rebuild_reason: prebuilt train_clm_native from local had stale config (D=512 NL=12 STEPS=20) — rebuilt on pod to use current 1.5B scale (D=2048 NL=24 STEPS=750000) from composed.c 2026-04-16

first_5min.loss_trend: monotonic down — 5.70 → 3.86 at step 2500 → 2.29 at step 2800 (60% reduction)

cuda_linkage.libcudnn_note: composed.c doesn't use cuDNN — uses cublas + NVRTC + custom CUDA kernels; no cudnn dependency
cuda_linkage.verified_via: Binary startup logs printed '[cuda_ffi] initialized', '[cuda_rtc] cache HIT clm_kernels.cu', '[cuda_kernels] gpu_init_kernels OK — 20 entry points resolved'; FFI uses dlopen-by-soname (cudart/cublas/nvrtc) not static link

sync_method: background watcher /workspace/r2_sync_watcher.sh in tmux session r2_sync — polls /workspace/ckpt_clm1b_r4/ every 60s, rclone copies step_*.hexackpt + best_*.hexackpt + final.hexackpt to r2:anima-models/clm1b/r4/, verifies then deletes local copy
fixes_vs_prior_run: Stdout to real log file /workspace/ckpt_clm1b_r4/train.log (NOT | head -30)
Binary rebuilt on pod with current 1.5B config (prior binary was stale D=512 NL=12 STEPS=20)
R2 sync watcher runs in background tmux — periodic upload every 60s of any checkpoints that appear
Verified GPU util >0 + >100W within 5 min (prior run was 0% GPU util for 20 min before container restart)

alm.note: Per task context agent 1 reported ALM pod running; not re-verified in this relaunch

dual_track_status.dual_track_note: CLM side revived — GPU active, loss descending, checkpoints will hit R2 at step 5000 (~13 min wall from now). ALM side was pre-existing running per prior context.

known_caveats: stdout buffering — log flushes every ~4KB (about every ~30 log lines / 3000 steps). OK for long run, loss visibility at 5min+ confirmed.
phi_proxy reports -nan at step 2500 — known non-blocking issue, training continues.
Pod has no persistent volume — catastrophic data loss if container restarts BEFORE first R2 sync at step 5000 (~13 min)
ALM pod lnzliav2e8du6i status was not re-verified in this session

growth_loop_status.note: Per feedback_report_includes_loop — growth loop not directly checked in this relaunch session; focus was CLM r4 restart per primary dual track mandate
growth_loop_status.reference: shared/roadmaps/anima.json for roadmap progress; CLM r4 is currently blocking next-stage gate per project_clm_r4_mmap_plan
